subject: Re: Configuring available GPUs?
body:
Hi Andrey,

you can untick the GPU checkbox in the window title bar. I need to make 
Warp remember that setting between restarts in the next version. 
Unfortunately, the number of processes can't be specified per-GPU right now 
-- it's only on or off.

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Friday, October 18, 2019 at 7:00:38 PM UTC+2, Andrey Malyutin wrote:
>
> Is it possible already, or would it be possible, to edit the config file 
> to restrict which GPUs can be selected to run Warp jobs? I have been 
> testing on the K3 server and I can imagine many users forgetting to 
> unselect display GPU when launching a job. 
>
> Thank you,
>
> Andrey
>
